# Elevate Roofing Services

> Licensed roofing contractor serving Los Angeles and Orange County — installation, repair, and replacement with free estimates.

Elevate Roofing Services delivers premium residential and commercial roofing across Southern California. We specialize in asphalt shingle, clay/concrete tile, standing seam metal, and flat/TPO systems, with rapid storm response and HOA-compliant installations.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, instant roofing estimator, and customer testimonials.
- [Locations](/locations): Full list of cities served across Los Angeles and Orange County.

## Service areas

- [Los Angeles](/roofing/los-angeles): Roofing services in Los Angeles.
- [Long Beach](/roofing/long-beach): Coastal roofing for Long Beach homes.
- [Pasadena](/roofing/pasadena): Roofing for Pasadena's Craftsman and Spanish Revival homes.
- [Santa Monica](/roofing/santa-monica): Ocean-front durable roofing in Santa Monica.
- [Irvine](/roofing/irvine): HOA-compliant roofing in Irvine.
- [Anaheim](/roofing/anaheim): Residential and commercial roofing in Anaheim.
- [Newport Beach](/roofing/newport-beach): Estate-quality tile and slate roofing in Newport Beach.
- [Malibu](/roofing/malibu): Class A fire-resistant roofing in Malibu.
